description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched gable roof with dark, textured tiling and a wide, rectangular footprint. The front facade is defined by a central recessed entryway flanked by large, floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a modern aesthetic. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden siding, giving the structure a warm, natural appearance. The side elevations have smaller, square windows spaced evenly, while the rear mirrors the front but with less pronounced entry features. A concrete walkway and platform run along the front and rear, offering easy access and a clean transition to the surrounding environment. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, large front windows, and wood siding, set on a concrete platform.
description_view_0: The front view shows a central recessed entryway with large, floor-to-ceiling windows on either side and a wide concrete platform.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the elongated gable roof and two small, square windows set in the wooden siding.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a symmetrical arrangement with two entry doors and smaller windows, mirroring the front but with less emphasis on the entry.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing the gable roof's slope and two small, square windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with evenly spaced side windows
